history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with styled dark hair, wearing a black t-shirt with a "Jordan" logo and black shorts, sits on a black Yamaha Aerox scooter at night. He is looking to his right, with his right hand touching his hair. The scooter has grey accents on the front panel with red and white graphic designs. The background shows a street scene at night, with wet asphalt reflecting the light from overhead streetlights and shop lights. Several buildings with metal gates and some decorative lights are visible. Indonesian flags, red and white, are hanging from some of the buildings, suggesting a festive or national occasion. The overall lighting is dim and moody, with strong contrasts between light and shadow, creating a dramatic atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, blacks, greys, and muted blues, with pops of red from the flags and scooter graphics. The style is realistic, capturing a candid moment with a slightly cinematic feel.
